source_text.column: Slug - uniquely identify name of the business
source_text.text: Mama Ejima home cooking restaurant

Mama Ejima home cooking restaurant is well structured spot where you get home food away from home. Specialized in dishing all kinds of Nigerian soups and swallows, different types of cooked rice and drinks
Bitter leave soup and fufu
Soup source from bitter leave and fermented cassava that has been cooked, pounded to pasta
Egusi soup with Garri
Delicious soup from melon seeds, taken with cassava flakes turned to pasta
Jollof Rice
Jollof Rice is a unique kind of Nigerian cooked rice blended and fused with tomato sauce with ingredients like peppers, chilli peppers onions and seasonings
Miss Sarah

source_text.column: Slug - uniquely identify name of the business
source_text.text: Gub's Kitchen Ventures

Gub's Kitchen Ventures is local restaurant that also serves amazing dishes: White Rice, fried rice, Egusi soup, afang soup, vegetable soup, oha soup, okra soup, Plus other soups. They have Garri, semo, pounded Yam and other swallows
Semo with Egusi soup
Semo with Egusi is a popular Nigerian Meals. A semolina pasta eaten with Egusi soup, a soup source from melon seeds, grinded and garnished with some kinds of fish and assorted meat
White Rice and tomato sauce
A boiled white Rice taken with tomato sauce. This sauce has mashed fresh tomatoes, vegetable oil, onions, pepper, and seasonings ingredients
Pounded Yam and okra soup

Pounded Yam is a paste from boiled and pounded Yam, eaten with soup source from okra. Okra is edible vegetable plant plant that is slimy in nature and very nutritious, chopped and cooked with leaves, some soups ingredients
Mrs Khadikat

source_text.column: Slug - uniquely identify name of the business
source_text.text: Mama Jemila Akara and pap
Prepares and fries Beans cakes popularly known as Akara alongside with pap. Mama Jemila make masah-- a popular northern cuisine. Here you can also get other fried foods like potatoes, and yams
Fried Akara
Akara is a deep fried beans Cake made from a mashed and ground Beans pudding
Fried Yams
Fried Yams are sliced Yams or chunked and fried in a deep hot vegetable oil till it softs
Fried potatoes
Fried potatoes are sliced potatoes or chunked and fried in a deep hot vegetable oil till it softs
Mr Munkaila

source_text.column: Slug - uniquely identify name of the business
source_text.text: Oga Munkaila fast-food/Meishai

Oga Munkaila fast-food and Meishai is fast food and breakfast meals Spot where you can enjoy a tasty and garnished instant noodles prepared in different ways. The place also serves, toast, fried eggs, Arabian tea, English tea, noodles with eggs, toast(bread)with egg, milk and chocolate hot drinks and soft drinks
Instant noodles(Indomie) with Eggs
Indomie with Eggs is fast-food parboiled and fried noodles with ingredients like vegetable oil, carrots, green pepper, Bell peppers, onions and seasonings, then topped with fried Eggs.
Toast(Bread) with eggs
Toast with eggs is a fried eggs that is placed inside a cut or sliced bread, then heat the bread in a frying pan or toaster till the bread turns brownish
Arabian tea
This is form of hot beverage sourced from the Arabian medicinal boiled leaves. The drink can preferably have : honey, sugar,. milk, chocolate, stirred and served hot.
Mrs Cynthia

source_text.column: Slug - uniquely identify name of the business
source_text.text: Madam Cynthia Roasted yams, plantains nd Beans

Madam Cynthia Roasted yams plantains and Beans is a nice place to enjoy your brunch, lunch with a well roasted yams, plantains, and porridge beans. This roasted yams or plantains can be mixed together without the porridge beans and sprinkled with palm oil sauce. Also the plantain or Yam can be served with oil sauce differently
Beans with Plantains

This is a porridge beans and a roasted plantains chopped in chunks and then mixed in company of vegetables oil sauce that has some onions, pepper and seasonings ingredients. It can go with some fish or cowskin (kpomo). It's a delicious and tasty local meal.
Beans with yam

This is a porridge beans and a roasted yams cut in chunks and then mixed in company of vegetables oil sauce that has some onions, pepper and seasonings ingredients. It can go with some fish or cowskin (kpomo). It's a delicious and tasty local meal
Yam with Palm oil sauce

It's a meal served with roasted chunks of yam and vegetable oil sauce separately by dunking your yams in the sauce This oil sauce has ingredients like hot peppers, onions, crayfish and seasonings. The oil also charred.
Shehu Aliyu

source_text.column: Slug - uniquely identify name of the business
source_text.text: Lajawa Suya and Barbecue

Lajawa Suya and Barbecue is a well structured spot that has existed more than 30 years. This place is the right place for lovers of grilled Chicken, meats, gizzards, Lamb and all kinds of barbequed or suyaed meats. It's quite pocket friendly and their service is also a top notch in Suya and grill business.
Chicken Suya

Chicken Suya is grilled or barbeque chicken meat which is prepared by heating the chicken on a grill stove or structure with firewood or coal underneath it. Before then, the chicken is completely smeared with a popular Suya pepper and seasonings called Yaji in Hausa language. The Chicken Suya can be served with the Yaji, accompanied with some cucumber, onions, cabbage and other vegetables
Grilled Gizzards.
The Gizzards is a chicken part, usually the the stomach. This part is really delicious and uniquely tasty. It's usually eaten with the seasoned Pepper(Yaji) and some Veggies
Suya Meats
Suyaed meats are various kinds of grilled or barbequed meats like Beef, Mutton, and Chevon served with seasoned Pepper along side with some vegetables like the cabbage, carrots, onions
UI best suya

source_text.text: Doyin Exclusive Taste
Budget friendly restaurant that dishes local delicacy and cuisine, like Amala, Fufu, Garri and soups like Egusi, vegetable soups, Yoruba soup, fried rice, white Rice and noodles(Spaghetti)
Amala and vegetable soup
Amala is a Yoruba food pasta from Yam flour or flakes prepared by mixing the flour in hot water, stirring and lightly cooked to form pasta
White Rice
White Rice is a staple and common food rice cereal consumed with tomato sauce or any other desired sauce like vegetable or egg
Spaghetti
Spaghetti is a long pasta noodle prepared with ingredients like tomato, pepper, onion, crayfish, seasonings and vegetable like carrots, cabbage, spinach, etc
Orji Uchenna. W

source_text.column: Slug - uniquely identify name of the business
source_text.text: NativePot
NativePot and Healthy Meals deals strictly on local delicacy especially Igbo tribe native foods and some local meals you can get from Igbo villages like Abacha, akidi, fio-fio, etc.
Okpa, Abacha with Ugba, Yam with Akidi, Fio-fio, Cowheadbetc

Okpa: This is the proteinous cowpeas pudding. The cowpeas is grinded and mixed ingredients like palm oil, pepper, onion, crayfish, seasoning, vegetable, etc,. Then wrapped either in a plastic bag or plate and cooked
Abacha & Akidi

Abacha: This is a slices of parboiled cassava. Thoroughly washed and then mixed with ingredients like palm oil, assorted fishes, meats, stock fishes, cowskin, crayfish, onion and seasonings. 
Akidi: Akidi is an Igbo native food from cocoyam source. This cocoyam is boiled, chopped, sun dried and pounded then cooked with local ingredients like Ukpaka(oil bean), vegetable oil, onion, crayfish, fish or meat plus seasonings
Abacha with Ugba

Abacha: This is a slices of parboiled cassava. Thoroughly washed and then mixed with ingredients like palm oil, assorted fishes, meats, stock fishes, cowskin, crayfish, onion and seasonings.
Ugba is a local name for oil bean which serve as the garnishing or complementary ingredient
Awa jibrim
